title: E-Commerce Platform
description: A full-stack e-commerce application featuring user registration, shopping cart functionality, secure payment integration, and a dedicated admin interface.

title: Stock Management System
description: A comprehensive system allowing users to visualize, track, and manage stock levels and product movements in real time.

title: Library Management App
description: A web application developed for AUI to manage library resources, including a real-time MySQL database for book tracking.
